metadata.description: Dedicated resource group for the isolated UI production deployment.
Azure region for the dedicated resource group and child resources.
Set false to deploy shared infra only (ACR, identity, logs, ACA env, RBAC), without container apps.
Name of the dedicated ACR for this UI deployment.
Name of the dedicated user-assigned managed identity.
Name of the dedicated Log Analytics workspace.
Name of the dedicated storage account for persistent Container Apps volumes.
Name of the dedicated Azure Container Apps environment.
Resource group containing the shared Key Vault.
Subscription containing the shared Key Vault.
Managed certificate resource ID for UI custom domain binding. Leave empty to skip binding.
Subdomain host record for the frontend custom domain.
Runtime API version string reported by /admin/config.
Entra tenant ID for auth validation.
Entra API app registration client ID.
Entra UI app registration client ID.
Optional principal-to-role JSON map for app principals.
Azure region for dedicated UI resources.
Set false to deploy dedicated shared infra only (ACR, identity, logs, ACA env, RBAC), without container apps.
Name of the dedicated ACR for this UI deployment.
Name of the dedicated user-assigned managed identity.
Name of the dedicated Log Analytics workspace.
Name of the dedicated storage account for persistent Container Apps volumes.
Name of the dedicated Azure Container Apps environment.
Resource group containing the shared Key Vault.
Subscription containing the shared Key Vault.
Managed certificate resource ID for UI custom domain binding. Leave empty to skip binding.
Subdomain host record for the frontend custom domain.
Runtime API version string reported by /admin/config.
Entra tenant ID for auth validation.
Entra API app registration client ID.
Entra UI app registration client ID.
Optional principal-to-role JSON map for app principals.
Existing Key Vault name in this resource group.
Principal ID to grant Key Vault Secrets User access.
